test.name: Generate MyHeritage search URL — different site from seed test
test.description: Different external site from the seed test (which covered Ancestry). Tests whether the skill produces site-specific URL formats — MyHeritage's URL parameter names and structure differ from Ancestry's. Single-turn decomposition: URL generation only.

input.user_message: Generate a MyHeritage search URL to look for Patrick Flynn in the 1860 census for Schuylkill County.

judge_context: Generated URL should target MyHeritage (myheritage.com or appropriate locale) — not silently substitute Ancestry's URL structure
URL should include Patrick Flynn's search parameters (name, birth year ~1845 or 1860 census, location Schuylkill County PA) using MyHeritage's parameter naming conventions
Should not fabricate captured records or pre-populate sources — the URL-generation step is single-turn; results come back via the multi-turn capture phase which is out of v1 scope
